description: Account for Shevat and Adar 1495 sel. ca. 1184. This is a single leaf from the notebook of Shemuel b. Saadya, written in two columns. A revenue list beginning in the first column continues in the upper part of the second one, and is followed by a list of expenditures. There are 19 items of revenue preserved, with a total for the two months of 441.5. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 359 #91)
tags: Shemuel b. Saadya, tax, qodesh, account, 12th c, communal, waqf
description_he: חשבון לשבט ואדר 1495 לשטרות (כ-1184), עלה בודד מפנקס שמואל בן סעדיה. שני טורים: הכנסות (19 פריטים, סה"כ 441.5) והוצאות.
